commands: sh -c 'if [ -f server/package.json ]; then cd server; fi; npm install'
sh -c 'if [ -f server/package.json ]; then cd server; fi; npx prisma generate'

deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f server/package.json ]; then cd server; fi; npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed.js && node src/index.js'
